title: Status should only be allowed to Done if other column has been filled
excerpt: Hi, I have a board with a status column, I would like some sort of a check, It should only be allowed to change the status to “Done” if some other column has been filled with information.

posts.author: kristeb (Bo Kristensen )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I have a board with a status column, I would like some sort of a check, It should only be allowed to change the status to “Done” if some other column has been filled with information.
